query:
-- Ancient/classical authors: definitively public domain (copyrightProtectedUntil = 0)
-- These authors have no death year in the Gutenberg CSV but are clearly ancient
UPDATE books SET copyrightProtectedUntil = 0
WHERE (
  authors LIKE '%Aristotel%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Homer%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Plato%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Platon%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Sokrates%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Cicero%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Virgil%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Vergil%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Ovid%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Horaz%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Tacitus%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Caesar%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Sophokles%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Euripides%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Aischylos%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Herodot%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Thukydides%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Seneca%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Marcus Aurelius%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Epiktet%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Plutarch%'
  OR authors LIKE '%Livius%'
)
AND (authors NOT LIKE '%,%' OR authors NOT REGEXP '[0-9]{4}');

-- Authors born before 1800 with no death year: also public domain
-- (born before 1800 → died before 1870 at the latest → 70+ years ago)
UPDATE books SET copyrightProtectedUntil = 0
WHERE copyrightProtectedUntil IS NULL
AND authors REGEXP ', [0-9]{3,4}-$'
AND CAST(REGEXP_SUBSTR(authors, '[0-9]{3,4}(?=-)') AS UNSIGNED) < 1800;

SELECT COUNT(*) as updated_to_public_domain FROM books WHERE copyrightProtectedUntil = 0;
